CustomField.description: Formula field that converts the Note Type API Values to the labels for use in the Note Table.
CustomField.formula: CASE( nd_Note_Type__c, 'RS', 'Research Note', 'PM', 'Prospect Comment', 'PD', 'Proposal Detail Note', 'GA', 'Gift Acknowledgement Note', 'NP', 'Proposal Note', 'SN', 'Strategy Notes', 'BB', 'Gift Planning Document', 'BI', 'Biographical Note', '2', '2', '3', '3', 'AA', 'WARNING', 'DN', 'Death Notice/Obituary', 'EC', 'Entity Couple Photo', 'EP', 'Entity Individual Photo', 'MN', 'Name Pronunciation', 'MP', 'Preferences', 'MS', 'Childrens High School', 'OT', 'Other Note', 'R1', 'Research Entity Announcement', 'R2', 'Research Pre-Qualification', 'R3', 'Research Biographic Profile', 'R4', 'Research Capacity Profile', 'R5', 'Research Comprehensive Profile', 'R6', 'Research Biographical Profile Report', 'WS', 'Wealth Screening', 'WX', 'WealthEx', 'ZA', 'Philanthropic Areas of Interest', 'ZC', 'Influencers / Collaborators to involve', 'ZD', 'Personal Milestones to influence timing', 'ZE', 'What are the immediate next steps?', 'ZH', 'Engagement/Action to take in FY21', 'ST', 'Strategy', 'AL', 'Alumni Membership Letter', 'AR', 'Award and Recognition', 'CI', 'Child Information', 'DC', 'DIS Capture', 'DD', 'Driving Directions', 'DO', 'Development Officer', 'DS', 'Donor Services Note', 'EI', 'Event Information Note', 'EN', 'Entity Photo Not Available', 'FB', 'Football Note', 'GB', 'Gift Agreement', 'GC', 'Goal/PresC/Pledges', 'GG', 'Goal/Gifts', 'GL', 'Goal/Pledges', 'GN', 'General Reference Note', 'GP', 'Gift Processing Note', 'GQ', 'Goal/PG', 'GT', 'Goal/PresC/Gifts', 'GU', 'Goal: Total Contacts', 'GV', 'Goal: New Bequest Expectancies Face Value', 'GW', 'Goal: New Bequest Expectancies Present Value', 'GX', 'Goal: New Income Producing Gifts Face Value', 'GY', 'Goal: New Income Producing Gifts Present', 'IN', 'Idea Note', 'MA', 'Political Affiliation', 'MD', 'Family members\' Deaths', 'ME', 'Employer Information', 'MF', 'Financial Outlook', 'ML', 'Mailing Note', 'MO', 'Obstacles to Overcome', 'OB', 'O\'Hara Benefits Note', 'PG', 'Pledge Communication', 'PC', 'Freshman Parent Card', 'PF', 'Purpose of Fund', 'PN', 'Prospect Post It Note', 'PS', 'Principal Stewardship', 'SB', 'Sorin Benefits Note', 'SAN', 'Stewardship Allocation Note', 'SW', 'Stewardship Note', 'TY', 'Thank You Note', 'UA', 'Undergraduate Admissions Note', 'UD', 'Undergraduate Admissions Declined', 'UW', 'Undergraduate Admissions Waitlist', 'ZB', 'What amount is to be solicited and when?', 'ZF', 'Key Notre Dame Influencers', 'ZG', 'External Influencers', 'BW', 'BEAT Weekend Comments', 'AB', 'Strategy Note (Legacy)', 'AI', 'Endowment Image', 'FI', 'FI', 'TC', 'Transformative Gifts Coaching Meeting', 'TS', 'Transformative Gifts Strategy Meeting', 'AC', 'Advisory Council Note', '' )
CustomField.label: Note Type Formula
